attributes.title: Sparrow BT — Unique Devices
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — Unique Devices", "type": "metric", "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 60}}}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "source.mac", "customLabel": "Devices"}}]}
attributes.description: Count of distinct BT devices observed (by source.mac).

attributes.title: Sparrow BT — BLE vs Classic
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — BLE vs Classic", "type": "pie", "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": false, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.type", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "Type"}}]}

attributes.title: Sparrow BT — MAC Randomization
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — MAC Randomization", "type": "pie", "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": false, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.mac.randomized", "size": 3, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "Randomized MAC"}}]}
attributes.description: How many devices advertise with a randomized (privacy) MAC versus a public MAC.

attributes.title: Sparrow BT — New Devices (< 5 min)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — New Devices", "type": "metric", "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 60}}}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "source.mac", "customLabel": "New devices"}}]}
attributes.description: Count of distinct devices whose first_seen is within the last 5 minutes.

attributes.title: Sparrow BT — Device Class Distribution
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — Device Class Distribution", "type": "pie", "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": false, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "source.mac"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "device.class_guess", "size": 15, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "Device Class"}}]}
attributes.description: Breakdown of classifier device.class_guess (phone / headset / wearable / iot / unknown / ...).

attributes.title: Sparrow BT — Top Manufacturers
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — Top Manufacturers", "type": "pie", "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": false, "labels": {"show": true, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "source.mac"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.company", "size": 15, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "Company"}}]}
attributes.description: Top 15 companies by unique device count.

attributes.title: Sparrow BT — Closest Devices (Estimated Range)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — Closest Devices", "type": "table", "params": {"perPage": 20, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": 4, "direction": "asc"}, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum"}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Obs"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.mac", "size": 20, "order": "asc", "orderBy": "4", "customLabel": "MAC"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.name", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "aggregate": "concat", "customLabel": "Name"}}, {"id": "6", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.company", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "aggregate": "concat", "customLabel": "Company"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "min", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.ibeacon_range_m", "customLabel": "Range (m)"}}, {"id": "5", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "signal.strength_dbm", "customLabel": "Max RSSI"}}, {"id": "7", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "device.class_guess", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "aggregate": "concat", "customLabel": "Class"}}]}
attributes.description: Estimated range for BLE devices advertising tx power (iBeacon Measured Power, Eddystone TX_POWER, AltBeacon, or AD Type 0x0A). Sorted by range ascending — closest first. Path-loss model assumes open air; indoor accuracy typically ±50%.

attributes.title: Sparrow BT — Strongest Signal (Closest Proxy)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — Strongest Signal", "type": "table", "params": {"perPage": 20, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": 3, "direction": "desc"}, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum"}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Obs"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.mac", "size": 20, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "3", "customLabel": "MAC"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "signal.strength_dbm", "customLabel": "Max RSSI (dBm)"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.name", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "aggregate": "concat", "customLabel": "Name"}}, {"id": "5", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.company", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "aggregate": "concat", "customLabel": "Company"}}, {"id": "6", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "device.class_guess", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "aggregate": "concat", "customLabel": "Class"}}]}
attributes.description: Ordinal proximity ranking by max(signal.strength_dbm). Works for devices that do NOT advertise tx power. Not a metric distance — just 'strongest = likely closest'.

attributes.title: Sparrow BT — New Devices (Last 5 Minutes)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — New Devices", "type": "table", "params": {"perPage": 20, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": 5, "direction": "desc"}, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum"}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Obs"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.mac", "size": 30, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "5", "customLabel": "MAC"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.name", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "aggregate": "concat", "customLabel": "Name"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.company", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "aggregate": "concat", "customLabel": "Company"}}, {"id": "7", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "device.class_guess", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "aggregate": "concat", "customLabel": "Class"}}, {"id": "5", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "event.ingested", "customLabel": "Last seen"}}, {"id": "6", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "signal.strength_dbm", "customLabel": "Max RSSI"}}]}
attributes.description: Devices whose observed.age_seconds < 300 — useful for detecting arrivals.

attributes.title: Sparrow BT — Top Named Devices
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — Top Named Devices", "type": "table", "params": {"perPage": 25, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": 1, "direction": "desc"}, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum"}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Observations"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.name", "size": 25, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "Name"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "top_hits", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "bluetooth.company", "size": 1, "sortField": "@timestamp", "sortOrder": "desc", "aggregate": "concat", "customLabel": "Company"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "signal.strength_dbm", "customLabel": "Max RSSI"}}]}
attributes.description: Devices that advertise a name, ranked by observation count.

attributes.title: Sparrow BT — Observations Over Time
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow BT — Observations Over Time", "type": "line", "params": {"grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "Observations"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": "true", "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "Observations", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 1, "style": "full", "color": "#E7664C"}}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Observations"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedEsInterval": true, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "observer.id", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "customLabel": "Sensor"}}]}
attributes.description: Total BT observations per time bucket, split by observer (sensor).

attributes.title: Sparrow Bluetooth — Situational Awareness
attributes.description: At-a-glance BT situational awareness: device counts, classes, distances, arrivals, and activity over time. All fields ECS 8.17 against sparrow-bt-* index.
